subcodes.first_line: O ye maidservants of God and leaves of the Tree of Eternal Life! Blessed are ye for attaining to that which was the greatest hope of Mary
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @call to action, @Mary Magdalene, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary
